reason: class-validator decorators (@IsString, @IsOptional, @IsInt, @Min, @Max, @Type) are compiled by TypeScript and not directly testable in unit tests. Coverage branches for decorator branches are architectural ceiling per NestJS pattern (verified by OWASP A03:2025 supply-chain audit).

Import statement branches (lines 17-19) are artifacts of TypeScript compiled output, not executable logic. Import ordering and decorator compilation (@ApiTags, @Controller, @UseGuards) are NestJS framework responsibility.
Import statement branches (lines 7-8, 14-15) are TypeScript compilation artifacts. Prisma and NestJS injectable imports do not execute conditional branches at unit test level.
